description: Generic portfolio theme exposure draft for Phase 5. This file does not store personal holdings, quantities, or account values.

themes.name: AI 인프라
themes.description: 데이터센터, 전력망, 냉각, 반도체 인프라 등 AI 설비투자 수혜 테마
notes: Growth-oriented infrastructure theme with moderate rate sensitivity and high risk-appetite sensitivity.

themes.name: 미국 대형 성장주
themes.description: 미국 대형 기술주와 성장주 중심 테마
notes: Sensitive to rates and broad risk appetite.

themes.name: 국내 소형 바이오
notes: Small-cap biotech tends to be liquidity and risk-appetite sensitive.

themes.name: 알트코인
notes: Highest sensitivity to risk appetite and liquidity conditions among MVP themes.

themes.name: 장기채
themes.description: 장기 듀레이션 채권 및 장기채 ETF 테마
notes: Vulnerable to rate increases; may partially offset risk-off pressure in some regimes.

themes.name: 현금·단기채
themes.description: 현금, MMF, 단기채 등 방어적 유동성 테마
notes: Defensive liquidity theme; negative exposures are intended to preserve diversification signals.
